title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE MUNICIPALITY OF DOÃA ALICIA, PROVINCE OF DAVAO, TO MABINI.

chunks.text:
H. No. 669 / 50 OG No. 6, 2372 (June, 1954)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1007, June 12, 1954 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE MUNICIPALITY OF DOÃA ALICIA, PROVINCE OF DAVAO, TO MABINI.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the municipality of Doña Alicia, Province of Davao, is changed to Mabini.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 12, 1954.
